titleStmt.title: SII 26.657: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 657. (A.R. No. 616 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records a gift of 25 kāśu for burning a nandā lamp using one uḻakku of ghee daily in the temple of the god Tiruchchenneṟi-uḍaiyār of Tiruchcherai alias Irājasundari-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, by an individual named Koṟṟamān Kōṭṭai Gaṇapatiyāḻvān of Karivēḍu, in [•••] nāḍu, in Dāmar-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam. It is stated that the gift was received with the undertaking to burn the lamp accordingly for ever, by the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple, including Kāmakāyakaṉ Jayaṅgoṇḍān Kunikkumpirān alias Nārpatteṇṇāyirabaṭṭaṉ, Āttirayan Śivapura [••••] Āḻvān alias Aṇukka-nambi, Āritan Periyān Ponnambalakkūtta [•••], Gavutaman [•••] Āḻ[••••]mbi and Āttiraiyan Baṭṭan Karuvuṇāyaka-baṭṭan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarāja devaṟku yāṇṭu 11 Āvatu tirucceṟai yāṉa Irājacuntari caturvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār koyilkāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇaril kāmakāyakaṉ jayaṅkoṇṭān kunikkumpirānāna nāṟpatteṇ ṇāyirapaṭṭaṉum Āttirayan civapura Āḻvānāna Aṇukka nampiyum Āritan periyān ponnampalakkūtta m kauvutaman Āḻ mpi
Āttiraiyan paṭṭan karuvuṇāyaka paṭṭanum Ivvaṉaivom jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmaṟkkoṭṭattu ka ṭunāṭṭukkariveṭṭil koṟṟamāna koṭṭai kaṇavatiyāḻvān pakkal nittaṟpaṭi naṟuney nittamuḻakku neyyāl tirununtāviḷakku Onṟerikkakkaṭavomāka nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 2 10 5 Irupattañcum Ikkācu Irupattañcum Ācantirakālamutal niṟka cakku Ittirununtāviḷakkerikka kaṭavomākavum Ikkoyi
lil Eṅkaḷ pakkal Ikkāṇi vilaikoṇṭārum Oṟṟikoṇṭārum śrītaṉam peṟṟārum mapāvattāluṭaiyārum Aṭaikoṇṭārum rājavilaiyālum sapai vilaiyālum māheśvara vilaiyālum Uḷḷiṭṭa peṟukaḷāl peṟṟuṭaiyarāyippaṭi kaṭantu pukkār Erikka kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilile kalveṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟuvārāka Icaintomikkoṭṭai kaṇavatiyāḻvāṉukku Ivva patiṉ Eḻāvatu
muppatu vaṭṭattu Ikkoyililc civappirāmaṇar pakkal Iviḷakkukku cilavākka kuṭutta kācu 5 ṅ Añcu Ākak kācu 3 10 muppatu Ittirununtāviḷakku Erikaikku Iṭṭa tirukkuttuviḷakku 1 Oṉṟiṉāl Iṭaiy Iruppu narācattoṭum Uḷ karu maṇṇoṭum Iṭai 100 nūṟu Ucaram muccāṇe ṉāl nilai 2 Iraṇṭu Itu panmāyecurar Iraṣṣai ... §
Digital edition of SII 26.657 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
